### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://animevietsub.site/phim/cong-chien-tranh-ss2-a1052/tap-12end-15072.html](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fanimevietsub.site%2Fphim%2Fcong-chien-tranh-ss2-a1052%2Ftap-12end-15072.html) ### Comment > The website detects users using adblockers. Normally the problem is solved by reloading the site. But this time this method didn't work, tried blocking elements that detect adblocker but they seems to nested the main element(the thing user wanted to see) inside the adblock detector so the main element is blocked along side with the detector. > To reproduce this problem, you must either accessing the website using Vietnam IP or answer the verification question for foreign IP, the answers for each questions are: > 1. 20/11 > 2. đồng > 3. 5 > 4. Việt Nam > 5. Bác Hồ > Then try to watch any anime, the warning appears. ### Screenshots

issue.title: jkanime.net
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://jkanime.net/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fjkanime.net%2F) ### Comment > No bloquea los anuncios "On click", las páginas ahora superponen los links maliciosos o con anuncios en los botones, si bien lo filtra al abrirlo y lo bloquea, no soluciona el problema inicial que es que varias páginas cuando detectan bloqueadores de anuncios reemplazan los botones por estos tipos de redireccionamientos agresivos. Sucede siempre al abrir el navegador y buscar la página la primera vez, luego de recargarla, los botones vuelven a sus href originales. DESTACO: En Brave con la extensión, esto no ocurría hasta la actualización de filtros que volvió prácticamente inutilizable esa basura de navegador, Firefox, mi navegador actual el único tipo de anuncios con los que me encuentro son de este tipo, el <a href (...)> cambiado. ### Screenshots

issue.title: collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com — False positive in AdGuard DNS
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard DNS

### AdGuard version

AdGuard DNS (public, 94.140.14.14)

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

the problem is with app, not a site

### Which device do you use?

Mobile

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

`collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com` is a production API endpoint for **PhishingEyes** — a licensed anti-phishing and fraud detection SDK integrated into banking mobile apps (Android). It is used by **Shinhan Bank (SHB)** in South Korea.

The SDK detects spy apps, remote control abuse, and system fraud on end-user devices. This endpoint receives security telemetry from the SDK — it is not an advertising tracker, analytics collector, or spyware server.

The domain is explicitly listed in `SpywareFilter/sections/tracking_servers_firstparty.txt`:
```
||collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com^
```

Blocking this domain prevents the SDK from reporting security threats to the bank's backend, directly impacting fraud protection for banking customers.

**Verified**: All other major filtering DNS providers (Quad9, Cloudflare Families, OpenDNS, CleanBrowsing, Yandex Safe, Control D, Comodo Secure) resolve this domain normally. Only AdGuard DNS blocks it.

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
i agree with those points about comments  & hint ,others
about moving filter ,you mean just below `$third-party,script,domain=klto9.com|f2movies.to......`

<hr>

the reason i haven't added to that section of denyallow (`$script,third-party,denyallow=tvableon.me|mega.co.nz|mega.nz|libs.baidu.com|ilfcdn.li[...]`) is that in there some websites had no iframes/video players so that rule is still helpful on ios ,adding `!+ NOT_PLATFORM(ios, ext_safari)` hint there could cause ads on ios devices.

issue.title: collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com — False positive in AdGuard DNS
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard DNS

### AdGuard version

AdGuard DNS (public, 94.140.14.14)

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

the problem is with app, not a site

### Which device do you use?

Mobile

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

`collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com` is a production API endpoint for **PhishingEyes** — a licensed anti-phishing and fraud detection SDK integrated into banking mobile apps (Android). It is used by **Shinhan Bank (SHB)** in South Korea.

The SDK detects spy apps, remote control abuse, and system fraud on end-user devices. This endpoint receives security telemetry from the SDK — it is not an advertising tracker, analytics collector, or spyware server.

The domain is explicitly listed in `SpywareFilter/sections/tracking_servers_firstparty.txt`:
```
||collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com^
```

Blocking this domain prevents the SDK from reporting security threats to the bank's backend, directly impacting fraud protection for banking customers.

**Verified**: All other major filtering DNS providers (Quad9, Cloudflare Families, OpenDNS, CleanBrowsing, Yandex Safe, Control D, Comodo Secure) resolve this domain normally. Only AdGuard DNS blocks it.

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
We confirmed that the domain started being filtered on October 13, 2025.
Could you let us know the reason why it was filtered?

comment.body:
I suppose that iOS is excluded to do not break video players (iframes), right?
If so, perhaps `ext_safari` should be added to this rule, too.
Also, it would be nice to add a comment explaining why these platforms are excluded from the rule.
And maybe it could be moved to the section with similar rules (few lines above)?

<hr>

Or for cases where iframes are broken when Safari extension or iOS app is used, we could just use the same rule which is already in filters but with hint?
I mean something like:
```adblock
!+ NOT_PLATFORM(ios, ext_safari)
$script,third-party,denyallow=tvableon.me|mega.co.nz|mega.nz|libs.baidu.com|ilfcdn.li[...]
```

I think quotation marks are not required.
It's easier to copy a rule without it.

comment.body:
It's also recommended to install AdGuard Extra.

---

This issue is known to be solved with [AdGuard Extra](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardExtra) userscript.

If you’re using AdGuard for Windows, Mac or Android, please make sure that AdGuard Extra is enabled in the application settings.

If you’re using AdGuard Browser Extension, we suggest installing AdGuard Extra in addition to it.

* [Install for Chrome, Edge or other Chromium-based browsers](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_chrome_release)
* [Install for Firefox](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_firefox_release)

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 22, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Evermore, It seems that the website admin started updating frequently its anti-adblock detection logic. It can lead what AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 cannot block/filter the anti-adblock script in the effective time.

Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic
